indicators.name: hard industrial surfaces
indicators.rationale: The hard industrial surfaces, such as the metal pipes and the wooden flooring, are not conducive to sleep.

indicators.name: open office layout
indicators.rationale: The open office layout with visible through-traffic cues and lack of privacy makes it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no personal storage or sleeping furniture
indicators.rationale: There is no personal storage or sleeping furniture, which are essential for a sleep environment.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The hard industrial surfaces and open office layout make it unsuitable for sleep. There is no personal storage or sleeping furniture, which are essential for a sleep environment.
